'''鈭歠-n-zh''' ('''kafanazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hegemonise|hegemonise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hegemonise|hegemonise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kafanazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifanazh|thifanazh]] || [[word:jifanazh|jifanazh]] || [[word:shifanazh|shifanazh]] || [[word:kifanazh|kifanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufanazh|thuthufanazh]] || [[word:jujufanazh|jujufanazh]] || [[word:shushufanazh|shushufanazh]] || [[word:kukufanazh|kukufanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufanazh|thufanazh]] || [[word:jufanazh|jufanazh]] || [[word:shufanazh|shufanazh]] || [[word:kufanazh|kufanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufanazh|thufanazh]] || [[word:jufanazh|jufanazh]] || [[word:shufanazh|shufanazh]] || [[word:kufanazh|kufanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefanazh|thefanazh]] || [[word:jefanazh|jefanazh]] || [[word:shefanazh|shefanazh]] || [[word:kefanazh|kefanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofanazh|thothofanazh]] || [[word:jojofanazh|jojofanazh]] || [[word:shoshofanazh|shoshofanazh]] || [[word:kokofanazh|kokofanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofanazh|thofanazh]] || [[word:jofanazh|jofanazh]] || [[word:shofanazh|shofanazh]] || [[word:kofanazh|kofanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofanazh|thofanazh]] || [[word:jofanazh|jofanazh]] || [[word:shofanazh|shofanazh]] || [[word:kofanazh|kofanazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]] || [[word:fanazh|fanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fanazh|th忙fanazh]] || [[word:j忙fanazh|j忙fanazh]] || [[word:sh忙fanazh|sh忙fanazh]] || [[word:k忙fanazh|k忙fanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafanazh|thathafanazh]] || [[word:jajafanazh|jajafanazh]] || [[word:shashafanazh|shashafanazh]] || [[word:kakafanazh|kakafanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafanazh|thafanazh]] || [[word:jafanazh|jafanazh]] || [[word:shafanazh|shafanazh]] || [[word:kafanazh|kafanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafanazh|thafanazh]] || [[word:jafanazh|jafanazh]] || [[word:shafanazh|shafanazh]] || [[word:kafanazh|kafanazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafanazh|shafanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafanazh|goshafanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafanazh|gokishafanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafanazhn眉|shafanazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkn眉|goshafanazhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanazhn眉|gokishafanazhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafanazhsh毛|shafanazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafanazhnksh毛|goshafanazhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafanazhsh毛|gokishafanazhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanazhro|shafanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkro|goshafanazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanazhro|gokishafanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanazhmu|shafanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkmu|goshafanazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanazhmu|gokishafanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafanazhsher|shafanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafanazhnksher|goshafanazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafanazhsher|gokishafanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafanazhng|shafanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkng|goshafanazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafanazhng|gokishafanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafanazhya|shafanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkya|goshafanazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafanazhya|gokishafanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafanazhyam|shafanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkyam|goshafanazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafanazhyam|gokishafanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanazhn眉sh毛|shafanazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkn眉sh毛|goshafanazhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanazhn眉sh毛|gokishafanazhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanazhn眉ro|shafanazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkn眉ro|goshafanazhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanazhn眉ro|gokishafanazhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanazhn眉mu|shafanazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkn眉mu|goshafanazhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanazhn眉mu|gokishafanazhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanazhsh毛n眉|shafanazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanazhnksh毛n眉|goshafanazhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanazhsh毛n眉|gokishafanazhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanazhsh毛ro|shafanazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanazhnksh毛ro|goshafanazhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanazhsh毛ro|gokishafanazhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanazhsh毛mu|shafanazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanazhnksh毛mu|goshafanazhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanazhsh毛mu|gokishafanazhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanazhron眉|shafanazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkron眉|goshafanazhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanazhron眉|gokishafanazhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanazhrosh毛|shafanazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkrosh毛|goshafanazhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanazhrosh毛|gokishafanazhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafanazhromu|shafanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkromu|goshafanazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafanazhromu|gokishafanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafanazhmun眉|shafanazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkmun眉|goshafanazhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafanazhmun眉|gokishafanazhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafanazhmush毛|shafanazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkmush毛|goshafanazhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafanazhmush毛|gokishafanazhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafanazhmuro|shafanazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafanazhnkmuro|goshafanazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafanazhmuro|gokishafanazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
